title: 3 Bizarre Facts About Sleep

segments.text: You can't actually 'catch up' on lost sleep.
But wait, that’s just the start.
Sleep deprivation affects your memory and emotions.
And most dreaming happens in REM sleep.
Is your sleep routine doing you any favors?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Get ready for some bizarre sleep facts! Follow for daily facts! 😴
